name: @nimblebraininc/git-worktree
description: Git worktree manager for isolated workspaces with branch lifecycle, risk classification, and merge control

tools.name: worktree_create
tools.description: Create a new isolated worktree with its own branch

tools.name: worktree_list
tools.description: List all tracked worktrees and their status

tools.name: worktree_status
tools.description: Get detailed status of a single worktree

tools.name: worktree_diff
tools.description: Get the full diff between a worktree branch and its base with risk classification

tools.name: worktree_merge
tools.description: Merge a worktree branch into its base branch

tools.name: worktree_discard
tools.description: Discard a worktree and its branch without merging

tools.name: worktree_commit
tools.description: Commit changes in a specific worktree
